description: Case style: Analogue watch with stylised rectangular case with engraved detail, stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial with pink markings, has steel toned seconds and minute hands, pink coloured hour hand, has branding at the 6 and 12 hour marksFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap style: Black, synthetic strap with cut-out detail, has a tang claspWater resistant up to 30 metresComes in a signature Fastrack caseWarranty: 2 years on mechanism only, 1 year on battery and metal strap (manufacturing defects only)
